title: Haus Projekt White 200x4.8mm Cable Ties Heavy Duty, 100pcs Premium Industrial Multi-Purpose Plastic Zip Tie Wraps, Indoor and Outdoor Use, Cable Management, Wires, Office, Garden, Zip Ties White
features: ♻️ SUSTAINABLE PIZZA-BOX STYLE PACKAGING - Our reliable cable ties come in an environmentally friendly, recyclable cardboard pizza-box style packaging to keep your unused cable wraps secure in one place!
💪🏻 TENSILE STRENGTH 22.2kg - Our High-Quality Cable Straps are made of industrial grade UL certified polyamide PA66 nylon making them extremely secure and durable.

☀️ UV RESISTANT– Our weather resistant heavy duty cable ties are suitable in a variety of different conditions. The ties will not fade or break between the temperature range of -10°C to +85 °C making them the perfect solution, hot or cold.

🚚 HUGE RANGE- Our cable management ties come in a wide range of colours such as: Black, White, Blue, Green, and Grey! Alongside this we have a huge range of sizes available including: 100mm x 2.5mm, 200mm x 2.5mm, 300mm x 3.6mm, 200mm x 4.8mm, 300mm x 4.8mm , 400mm x 7.6mm.

✅ SIMPLE TO USE – These strong, durable cable ties have a self-locking mechanism that provides security and reliability. Easily tighten the cable tie to the desired length and the self-locking teeth will keep the zip tie tightly in place. They can be used for DIY, business, and commercial uses. This can include organising office electrical wires, securing a suitcase or bike accessories, hanging lights or banners, supporting plants in the garden, or securing objects for transportation.
